calendar.matters:
Petitioners Medical Board Of California, Kimberly Kirchmeyer, And Dev Gnanadev, M.D.'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Petition (Part 2 Of 2 For Purposes Of Entry Of Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Petitioners Medical Board Of California, Kimberly Kirchmeyer, And Dev Gnanadev, M.D.'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Petition (Part 2 Of 2 For Purposes Of Entry Of Tentative Ruling Only)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brad Moores, Esq. 619-742-8612 for Plaintiff.
Carolyn Evans, Deputy Attorney General, 415-510-3448 from the Office of the Atorney General for Defendant MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, KIMBERLY KIRCHMEYER, DEV GNANADEV, M.D.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff argues Court of Appeal Decisions. Defendant agress with the tentativ ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, KIMBERLY KIRCHMEYER, DEV GNANADEV, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Respondents Medical Board of California, Kimberley Kirchmeyer, and Dev Gnanadev, M.D.'s demurrer to Petitioner William Y. Moores, M.D.'s first amended petition for writ of mandate and complaint for damages and declaratory and injunctive relief is sustained without leave to amend as to all nine causes of action. Petitioner's claims fail for several reasons-most notably, expiration of statutory limitations periods and principles of res judicata. Per Evidence Code sections 452(c)-(d), and 453, the Court takes judicial notice of the judicial and administrative records presented by Respondents. The Court declines to take judicial notice of the correspondence attached to Petitioner's request for judicial notice, which is neither a proper subject for judicial notice nor relevant to the resolution of the demurrer.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2019 Off Calendar
